title: pneumonanthe purpurea
intro: Pneumonanthe purpurea, also known as Lungwort, is a flowering plant that belongs to the borage family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, making it a valuable treatment for respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Lungwort is rich in mucilage, a thick, protective substance that soothes irritated mucous membranes and helps to expel mucus, providing relief from congestion and coughs. Herbal preparations of Lungwort can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often recommended for their calming and restorative effects on the lungs and respiratory system.
